def positive_binary_or_multipart_response_missing_explicit_content_type():
    rule_id = "binary_or_multipart_response_missing_explicit_content_type"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Binary or streaming response returned without an explicit Content-Type header."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
